existingSystem.notes: Brownfield NestJS microservices API. Gateway + notifications-ms + events-ms + users-ms + maintenances-ms + vehicles-ms. Firebase Auth. WebSocket tracking in gateway. Serves the Rideglory Flutter app.

iterations.goal: Framework: PRD, agents, handoffs, workflow, dashboard, CLI commands
iterations.notes: Run /solo-plan to define product iterations. Framework installed from Claude-cami reference.

events.detail: Clean workflow state for rideglory-api (NestJS brownfield). Microservices: gateway, tracking, events, users. No product plan until /solo-plan.
notifications-ms fully implemented (TCP microservice, Prisma, FCM). api-gateway NotificationsService refactored to RPC proxy. Tracking analysis: keep in api-gateway (see backend.md).
